initial_candidates.sql:
WITH monthly_balances AS (
    SELECT 
        strftime('%Y-%m', date(txn_date, 'start of month')) AS month,
        SUM(txn_amount) AS total_balance
    FROM customer_transactions
    GROUP BY strftime('%Y-%m', date(txn_date, 'start of month'))
),
adjusted_balances AS (
    SELECT 
        month,
        LAG(total_balance, 1) OVER (ORDER BY month) AS prev_month_balance
    FROM monthly_balances
)
SELECT 
    month,
    MAX(0, prev_month_balance) AS prev_month_balance
FROM adjusted_balances
WHERE month != (SELECT MIN(month) FROM monthly_balances)
ORDER BY month ASC;

WITH monthly_balances AS (
    SELECT 
        strftime('%Y-%m', date(txn_date, 'start of month')) AS month,
        SUM(txn_amount) AS total_balance
    FROM customer_transactions
    GROUP BY strftime('%Y-%m', date(txn_date, 'start of month'))
),
previous_month_balances AS (
    SELECT 
        month,
        LAG(total_balance, 1) OVER (ORDER BY month) AS prev_month_total_balance
    FROM monthly_balances
)
SELECT 
    month,
    COALESCE(MAX(0, prev_month_total_balance), 0) AS prev_month_total_balance
FROM previous_month_balances
WHERE prev_month_total_balance IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY month ASC;

WITH monthly_balances AS (
    SELECT 
        strftime('%Y-%m', txn_date) AS month,
        SUM(txn_amount) AS total_balance
    FROM customer_transactions
    GROUP BY strftime('%Y-%m', txn_date)
),
previous_month_balances AS (
    SELECT 
        m1.month,
        COALESCE(m2.total_balance, 0) AS prev_month_balance
    FROM monthly_balances m1
    LEFT JOIN monthly_balances m2 
        ON m2.month = (
            SELECT strftime('%Y-%m', date(m1.month || '-01', '-1 month'))
        )
)
SELECT 
    month,
    MAX(0, prev_month_balance) AS prev_month_balance
FROM previous_month_balances
WHERE month != (SELECT MIN(month) FROM monthly_balances)
ORDER BY month ASC;

WITH monthly_balances AS (
    SELECT 
        strftime('%Y-%m', txn_date) AS month,
        SUM(txn_amount) AS total_balance
    FROM customer_transactions
    GROUP BY strftime('%Y-%m', txn_date)
),
previous_month_balances AS (
    SELECT 
        m1.month AS current_month,
        COALESCE(m2.total_balance, 0) AS prev_month_balance
    FROM monthly_balances m1
    LEFT JOIN monthly_balances m2 
        ON m2.month = strftime('%Y-%m', date(m1.month || '-01', '-1 month'))
)
SELECT 
    current_month AS month,
    MAX(0, prev_month_balance) AS total_balance
FROM previous_month_balances
WHERE current_month != (SELECT MIN(month) FROM monthly_balances)
ORDER BY month ASC;

WITH monthly_balances AS (
    SELECT 
        strftime('%Y-%m', date(txn_date, 'start of month')) AS month,
        SUM(txn_amount) AS total_balance
    FROM customer_transactions
    GROUP BY strftime('%Y-%m', date(txn_date, 'start of month'))
),
adjusted_balances AS (
    SELECT 
        month,
        LAG(total_balance, 1) OVER (ORDER BY month) AS prev_month_balance
    FROM monthly_balances
)
SELECT 
    month,
    MAX(0, prev_month_balance) AS adjusted_prev_month_balance
FROM adjusted_balances
WHERE prev_month_balance IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY month ASC;

adjusted_balances AS (
